creator: azverev@ozon.ru
text:
Can you share your idea about how to handle perl's modules in this case?

PKGNAME is unique here, and if I install module under perl 5.12 I can't
use it with 5.14 or 5.16
We can share SITE_PERL among all Perl installations, but I doubt it will
work for XS modules.
We can add perl version as PKGPREFIX, but having ability to install same
port 3 times also sucks.
